title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: I am a web developer with over 2 years of experience in remote web development, as well as experience working in corporate environments. My interest in how websites work has grown into a passion for creating intuitive, responsive, and seamless user experiences.
long_bio: In my spare time, I enjoy learning new things to continuously improve my skills, and reading books as a way to broaden my perspective and understanding.
